main.description: A purchase record representing a completed or pending transaction between a buyer and a seller for a specific work product or service.

buyer.description: DID of the party making the purchase.

seller.description: DID of the party receiving payment.

subject.description: AT-URI of the record being purchased (e.g. a listing, service, or deliverable).

amount.description: Purchase amount in the smallest unit of the given currency (e.g. cents for USD).

consentRef.description: Optional reference to the at.ofwork.consent record governing this purchase.

proofRef.description: Optional reference to the at.ofwork.proof record attesting to this purchase.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the purchase was initiated.

completedAt.description: Timestamp of when the purchase reached a terminal state.
